title: Talon's Building Particles
description: Create and Control Particles in Survival Minecraft!
body: Build with particles! Craft a particle arrow using blaze powder and glowstone dust and shoot it to create a particle cloud. Then you can change its settings and make it look how you like. Every particle in the game is included and all their relevant settings! You can even set it to trigger randomly, every few ticks, or even control it with redstone dust!
